about.title: Executive Summary
about.p1: In light of the restructuring of global supply chains, major industrial companies are moving toward diversifying their manufacturing locations beyond their traditional hubs, and establishing more flexible and stable regional production bases.
about.p2: Oman Global Industrial Hub 2027 emerges as a strategic platform to position the Sultanate of Oman as a regional center for advanced industries, attract industrial investments, facilitate technology transfer, and build cross-border manufacturing partnerships.
about.gateway: The event is not a traditional equipment exhibition — it is an integrated industrial investment gateway that connects within a unified system in the Sultanate of Oman:

sectors.title: Exhibition Sectors
sectors.subtitle: The Map of Participating Investment and Industrial Opportunities
sectors.description: The spaces are designed to serve as dynamic platforms for forming international business partnerships and localizing technology, featuring six strategic sectors covering the entire modern production cycle.

industry40.title: Industry 4.0 & Automation
industry40.tagline: Factories of the Future… are built today
industry40.description: The leading destination for smart production technologies that double efficiency and reduce costs. Industrial robotics, 3D printing, digital control systems, and AI applications.

machinery.title: Heavy Machinery & Equipment
machinery.tagline: The muscles of production and makers of impact
machinery.description: The largest space dedicated to showcasing the latest equipment and production lines that form the backbone of productive and processing sectors.

digital.title: Digital Transformation & Industrial IoT
digital.tagline: Data that drives profits and protects investments
digital.description: The technological platform for digitizing industrial operations and connecting machines to smart networks.

logistics.title: Smart Logistics & Supply Chain
logistics.description: The logistics solutions hub that ensures the flexibility of goods movement and facilitates international trade flows.

investment.title: Investment & Business Development
investment.description: The beating heart of deal-making, dedicated to entities that finance, support, and develop industrial infrastructure.

green.title: Green Industry & Sustainability
green.description: Renewable energy solutions for factories, recycling systems, and industrial water treatment technologies.

day1.title: Day One
topics: Industry as a pillar of economic security

vision.title: Oman Vision 2040
vision.subtitle: Sultanate of Oman: The Next Strategic Destination
vision.description: Oman was not chosen to host this exceptional event by chance; rather, it was based on solid economic fundamentals, a firm government direction, and exceptional incentives to increase the industrial sector's contribution to 25% of GDP.
vision.gdpLabel: Target Industrial Sector Contribution to GDP

whyOman.title: Why Oman?
whyOman.subtitle: True Competitive Assets
whyOman.quote: Oman is not just a market — it is a regional manufacturing and export platform connecting Asia with Africa and the Gulf

event.title: Event Structure
event.subtitle: We do not sell exhibition space — we deliver measurable results

features.deals: A platform designed for signing major contracts and strategic partnerships
features.access: Direct and exclusive access to CEOs and investors with financial authority
features.infrastructure: Integrated infrastructure near Muscat International Airport

cta.title: Launch Toward Global Industrial Horizons

blog.title: Blog
blog.subtitle: Latest news and articles on industry and investment in Oman

post1.title: Oman Leads the Industrial Scene in the Gulf
post1.excerpt: Industrial output in Gulf countries is recording 7% to 9% annual growth, with Oman leading in attracting Asian and Gulf capital for industrial localization.

post2.title: Industry 4.0 Revolution and Supply Chain Restructuring
post2.excerpt: Global spending on industrial digital transformation is expected to surge to $1.8 trillion by 2030.

post3.title: Duqm Port: Strategic Hub for Heavy Projects
post3.excerpt: Duqm Port offers unprecedented strategic integration connecting manufacturers to Asian, African, and Gulf markets.

post4.title: Green Industry: Sustainability Enhances Competitiveness
post4.excerpt: Renewable energy solutions and recycling systems open new horizons for Omani factories.
